Home › Seminole County › Historic Sanford

Neighborhood · Seminole County · Updated June 2026

Restaurants in Historic Sanford

50%Grade A
4.3Avg rating
12Restaurants

Every one of the 12 restaurants in Historic Sanford on this page carries an A–F health grade built from its latest Florida DBPR inspection. 6 hold an A, and the typical diner rating runs 4.3 stars. The list runs best grade first.
